allow: Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/data/content.js','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/export const certifications = \\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\n\\]/\)[1];const titles=[...m.matchAll\(/title: '\([^']+\)'/g\)].map\(x=>x[1]\);const urls=\(m.match\(/url: '/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('total certs:',titles.length,'| with verify links:',urls\);console.log\('Anthropic:',[...m.matchAll\(/issuer: 'Anthropic Education'/g\)].length\)")
